root_bottleneck: DOMAIN AUTHORITY. 33-day-old domain with 0 backlinks is in Google's sandbox. Pages are crawled but not trusted enough to rank. No amount of internal optimization can overcome the backlink gap.
corrective_action_plan: 1. Execute ALL planned GSC UI indexing (70+ remaining T3 calcs not yet clicked in GSC)
2. Fix GSC token refresh for daily automated pulls
3. Aggressive internal linking from indexed pages to all T3 calcs
4. Follow-up outreach to 7 sent targets — 2 overdue today (Jun 6)
5. Create 1 high-confidence content page when any query reaches 10+ impressions
7. Monitor GSC daily for first click — that's the canary
honest_assessment: The site is 33 days old. Google sandbox for new domains typically lasts 2-6 months. Without backlinks, the sandbox could extend indefinitely. Internal optimization (indexing, links, content) is necessary but not sufficient — the backlink gap is the #1 blocker.
